title: Real Foods!
description: This mods adds real foods onto minecraft!
body:
Do you want to have foods from real life in minecraft? Well your prayers have been awnsered, because this mod is exactly that!
This mod adds:
A big mac
An oreo made of coke(Yes, this exists in real life)
A coke made of oreo(Yes, this also exists in real life)
A normal coke
M&Ms
Pringles
A sandwich

and these items should appear in vanilla chests! This mod also let's you craft the foods, once you get them from a chest, their recipe will be added to the vanilla game


Mod requires neoforge.
